title: Investigate lgrep watcher freshness — symbol indexes go stale
success_hint: Watcher keeps symbol indexes complete for repos with active file changes; stale/incomplete indexes are detected and surfaced. Acceptance: after re-index of /home/jon/toolbox, file changes trigger incremental updates and the index file count tracks actual repo file count within a reasonable window.

title: Gate lgrep ChunkStore auto-clear behind explicit approval
success_hint: ChunkStore no longer silently wipes cache directories on connection failure. Either: requires explicit operator approval, or moves to a separate recoverable state with diagnostic surface. Acceptance: simulated LanceDB corruption does not result in automatic cache directory deletion.

title: Patch lgrep MCP symbol handler to surface real duration_ms
success_hint: MCP symbol handler returns real query timing in duration_ms field; operators can distinguish fast-empty from slow-empty responses. Acceptance: duration_ms matches CLI timing_ms within reasonable bounds for the same query.

title: Add delete-time reason revalidation to both prune_orphans and prune_symbols
success_hint: Both prune_orphans and prune_symbols revalidate stale reason immediately before delete (rmtree or unlink). Race scenario: scan says stale at T1, writer replaces file/dir via rename at T2 (T2>T1), pruner deletes at T3 (T3>T2) destroying fresh write. Acceptance: simulated race in test does not delete a freshly-written entry when its repo_path was recreated between scan and delete. Applies to both prune_orphans.py:323-365 (shutil.rmtree path) and the new prune_symbols execute branch.
